rules.rule: every troubleshooting symptom MAY carry one or more grounded visuals; each MUST cite evidence_ids.
escalation steps MUST cite the support manifest AND a grounded escalation-support image (if available).
operational warnings MUST cite at least one warning-role visual when a visual exists in the asset ledger.
unresolved ambiguity MUST be carried forward as 'visual_unresolved=true' rather than silently dropped.
confidence_state propagates from grounding into the troubleshooting flow; reviewer-approved is required for publication-ready promotion.
